If a correction, stale detail, or rejected alternative matters, mention it explicitly in rationale.

parts.text: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so duplicate refreshes for the same tenant coalesce, while unrelated tenants can refresh in parallel. A single global mutex was rejected because it would make unrelated tenants block each other.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e1863eacffecG40pKECWckHQv","blob_id":"auth_refresh_queue","message_id":"msg_e1e79c16c001do7MQSMC6YoTTP"},"rationale":"The cited message explicitly states the rejected alternative was one global mutex, that it was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other, and that RefreshQueue uses a per-tenant key to coalesce same-tenant duplicates while allowing different tenants to continue in parallel.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["Billing retry queue rationale","Markdown parser onboarding cleanup"]}
